World.headline: American KC-135 Refueling Plane Crashes in Iraq; Five Crew Missing Amid Iran War Escalation
World.summary: A US Air Force Boeing KC-135 Stratotanker refueling aircraft crashed in western Iraq during Operation Epic Fury, with five crew members missing. While US Central Command stated the crash was not due to hostile fire, an Iran-backed Iraqi armed group later claimed responsibility, intensifying regional tensions. This incident occurs as the US expands its military campaign alongside Israel against Iran.
key_points: US KC-135 refueling aircraft crashed in western Iraq, 5 crew missing.
US military stated crash was not due to hostile or friendly fire.
An Iran-backed Iraqi group claimed responsibility for downing the plane.
Incident escalates tensions in the ongoing US-Israel vs. Iran conflict.

World.headline: US Allows Limited Russian Oil Sales After Iran Threatens to ‘Set Region’s Oil, Gas on Fire’
World.summary: The US has permitted limited sales of Russian oil in response to Iran's threats to destabilize the Middle East's oil and gas supply.
